title: Multi-Browser Stress Test Report

tests.title: checkout requires first name @validation
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Checkout Flow › checkout requires first name @validation

featureMeta.name: Checkout Flow
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to complete a purchase end-to-end

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that leaving first name blank shows a validation error
behaviours: User logs in, adds item, goes to checkout step 1
User submits without filling any fields
Validation error is shown for first name

tests.title: complete checkout with one item @smoke @critical
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Checkout Flow › complete checkout with one item @smoke @critical

featureMeta.name: Checkout Flow
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to complete a purchase end-to-end

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies a standard user can add one item and complete checkout
behaviours: User logs in and navigates to inventory
User adds the first item to cart
User opens the cart
User proceeds to checkout step 1
User fills in personal details
User reviews order summary and confirms
Order confirmation page is shown

steps.title: Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Thank you for your order!')

tests.title: checkout requires last name @validation
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Checkout Flow › checkout requires last name @validation

featureMeta.name: Checkout Flow
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to complete a purchase end-to-end

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that leaving last name blank shows a validation error
behaviours: User logs in, adds item, goes to checkout step 1
User fills only first name and submits
Validation error is shown for last name

tests.title: checkout requires postal code @validation
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Checkout Flow › checkout requires postal code @validation

featureMeta.name: Checkout Flow
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to complete a purchase end-to-end

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that leaving postal code blank shows a validation error
behaviours: User logs in, adds item, goes to checkout step 1
User fills first and last name but not postal code
Validation error is shown for postal code

tests.title: checkout with all 6 items shows correct count @regression
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Checkout Flow › checkout with all 6 items shows correct count @regression

featureMeta.name: Checkout Flow
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to complete a purchase end-to-end

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies cart badge shows 6 when all items are added
behaviours: User logs in and adds all available products
Cart badge shows 6 items
Cart page lists 6 items

steps.title: Query count getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })

tests.title: cancel checkout returns to inventory @regression
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Checkout Flow › cancel checkout returns to inventory @regression

featureMeta.name: Checkout Flow
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to complete a purchase end-to-end

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies cancel button on checkout step 1 navigates back to inventory
behaviours: User reaches checkout step 1
User clicks Cancel
User is returned to the cart page

tests.title: clicking product name opens detail page @smoke
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Product Detail › clicking product name opens detail page @smoke

featureMeta.name: Product Detail
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to view product details before buying

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies product name link navigates to the product detail page
behaviours: User logs in and clicks the first product name
Product detail page is shown with name, description and price

tests.title: back button on detail page returns to inventory @smoke
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Product Detail › back button on detail page returns to inventory @smoke

featureMeta.name: Product Detail
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to view product details before buying

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies the Back button on a product detail page navigates back
behaviours: User opens a product detail page
User clicks Back to Products
User is back on the inventory page

tests.title: add to cart from detail page updates badge @regression
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/checkout.spec.js › Product Detail › add to cart from detail page updates badge @regression

featureMeta.name: Product Detail
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to view product details before buying

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies Add to cart button on product detail page works
behaviours: User opens a product detail page
User clicks Add to cart from the detail page
Cart badge updates to 1

tests.title: standard user can login and add item to cart @smoke @critical
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/saucedemo.spec.js › Shopping Cart › standard user can login and add item to cart @smoke @critical

featureMeta.name: Shopping Cart
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to browse and add products to my cart

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that a standard user can log in and add the first product to the cart
behaviours: User navigates to the login page and submits valid credentials
User adds the first product to the cart
Cart badge updates to reflect one item

tests.title: user can remove item from cart @smoke
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/saucedemo.spec.js › Shopping Cart › user can remove item from cart @smoke

featureMeta.name: Shopping Cart
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to browse and add products to my cart

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that an item added to the cart can be removed
behaviours: User logs in and navigates to inventory
User adds the first product to the cart
User removes the item — cart badge disappears

tests.title: user can sort products by price @regression
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/saucedemo.spec.js › Shopping Cart › user can sort products by price @regression

featureMeta.name: Shopping Cart
featureMeta.description: As a customer I want to browse and add products to my cart

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that sorting by price low-to-high reorders the product list
behaviours: User logs in and lands on the inventory page
User selects 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
First product price is the lowest available

tests.title: locked out user sees expected error @smoke @auth
tests.fullName: › chromium › ui/saucedemo.spec.js › Authentication › locked out user sees expected error @smoke @auth

featureMeta.name: Authentication
featureMeta.description: As a system I want to prevent locked-out users from accessing the app

tests.scenarioDescription: Verifies that a locked-out user sees a clear error message on login
behaviours: Locked-out user submits credentials on the login page
An error message is displayed explaining the account is locked

Page contains a heading that does not exist — assertion fails intentionally
